intent: A friend takes a red flower from above the park's doorway and hands it to the narrator, then looks at the narrator's hand. Real possession transfer in a new scene class (park-gate vignette). Reinforces G015_no_possessive (must_reinforce: true) four times via 公園のドア / ドアの上 / 私の手 / 私の手, and INTRODUCES G003_desu — the polite copula です — via a single reflection sentence 「小さい花です。」 between the setting and the action. This satisfies Check 3.10 (per-story floor while N5 is uncovered) by introducing a foundational N5 point (the most-used grammar in the canonical Japanese sentence shape Xです) without straining the size band or mint budget. Mint budget: 3 (赤い, ドア, 上) — coherent 'spatial framing + named color' neighborhood drawn from the era's north-star.

sentences.jp: 朝、私は公園のドアの上に赤い花を見ます。
sentences.en: In the morning, I see a red flower above the park's door.
A friend walks along the path.

sentences.jp: 友達は赤い花を取ります。
sentences.en: The friend takes the red flower.

sentences.jp: 友達は花を私の手に渡します。
sentences.en: The friend hands the flower into my hand.

sentences.jp: 友達は私の手を見ます。
sentences.en: The friend looks at my hand.
